use_cases: Creating animated hero headlines with wave-like scroll effects
Adding dynamic text presentations to landing pages and marketing sites
Building scroll-driven typography animations for portfolios and creative sites
Enhancing product descriptions with attention-grabbing animated text
Creating engaging onboarding flows with animated text reveals
ai_summary: A scroll-driven wavy text animation component that uses Framer Motion to create fluid wave distortions on text as users scroll. Features spring physics, reduced motion support, and configurable wave parameters including amplitude, frequency, and phase shift. Renders responsively with window-aware calculations and is suitable for hero sections, animated headlines, and dynamic typography displays across landing pages and marketing sites.
